title: South Korea
body:
O.P.
Hi,
I'm planning to visit japan next year and planning to travel over to Korea for about 3-7 days. Not sure yet.
Can anyone recommend or give me more details on what to do and hints and tips around there? Like transportation etc.
Best to do a "tour" thing or just plan our own trip? Easy transportation? People understand english much over there?
I wouldn't mind a discussion going on this thread would be helpful. Did a quick google search and it seems like not alot of places and did a search on whirlpool and seems like people don't really recommend South Korea?
if any can help that would be great.
Thanks alot.
